13 #include <arcane/utils/FatalErrorException.h>
14 #include <arcane/utils/NumArray.h>
15 
16 #include <arcane/core/VariableTypes.h>
17 #include <arcane/core/IItemFamily.h>
18 
19 #include <arcane/accelerator/core/RunQueue.h>
20 #include <arcane/accelerator/NumArrayViews.h>
21 #include <arcane/accelerator/RunCommandLoop.h>
22 
23 #include "CsrFormatMatrix.h"
24 #include "DoFLinearSystem.h"
25 
26 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
27 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
28 
29 namespace Arcane::FemUtils
30 {
31 
32 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
33 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 
35 void CsrFormat::
36 initialize(IItemFamily* dof_family, Int32 nnz, Int32 nbRow, RunQueue& queue)
37 {
38  info() << "Initialize CsrFormat: nb_non_zero=" << nnz << " nb_row=" << nbRow;
39 
40  eMemoryRessource mem_ressource = queue.memoryRessource();
41  m_matrix_row = NumArray<Int32, MDDim1>(mem_ressource);
42  m_matrix_column = NumArray<Int32, MDDim1>(mem_ressource);
43  m_matrix_value = NumArray<Real, MDDim1>(mem_ressource);
44  m_matrix_rows_nb_column = NumArray<Int32, MDDim1>(mem_ressource);
45 
46  m_matrix_row.resize(nbRow);
47  m_matrix_column.resize(nnz);
48  m_matrix_value.resize(nnz);
49  m_matrix_row.fill(-1, &queue);
50  m_matrix_column.fill(-1, &queue);
51  m_matrix_value.fill(0, &queue);
52  m_matrix_rows_nb_column.resize(nbRow);
53  m_matrix_rows_nb_column.fill(0, &queue);
54  m_dof_family = dof_family;
55  m_last_value = 0;
56  m_nnz = nnz;
57  info() << "Filling CSR Matrix with zeros";
58 }
59 
60 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
61 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
62 
63 void CsrFormat::
64 translateToLinearSystem(DoFLinearSystem& linear_system, const RunQueue& queue)
65 {
66  bool do_set_csr = linear_system.hasSetCSRValues();
67  info() << "TranslateToLinearSystem this=" << this << " is_csr=" << do_set_csr;
68 
69  const Int32 nb_row = m_matrix_row.dim1Size();
70  const Int32 matrix_column_size = m_matrix_column.dim1Size();
71 
72  // When using CSR format, we need to know the number of non zero values for
73  // each row.
74  // NOTE: it should be possible to compute that in setCoordinates().
75  // and this value is constant if the structure of the matrix do not change
76  // so we can store these values instead of recomputing them.
77  if (do_set_csr) {
78  m_matrix_rows_nb_column.resize(nb_row);
79  auto command = makeCommand(queue);
80  auto out_matrix_rows_nb_column = viewOut(command, m_matrix_rows_nb_column);
81  auto in_matrix_rows = viewIn(command, m_matrix_row);
82  command << RUNCOMMAND_LOOP1(iter, nb_row)
83  {
84  auto [i] = iter();
85  Int32 nb_column = 0;
86  if (((i + 1) < nb_row) && (in_matrix_rows(i) == in_matrix_rows(i + 1))) {
87  out_matrix_rows_nb_column[0];
88  return;
89  }
90  for (Int32 j = in_matrix_rows(i); ((i + 1) < nb_row && j < in_matrix_rows(i + 1)) || ((i + 1) == nb_row && j < matrix_column_size); j++) {
91  ++nb_column;
92  }
93  out_matrix_rows_nb_column[i] = nb_column;
94  };
95  CSRFormatView csr_view(view());
96  linear_system.setCSRValues(csr_view);
97  return;
98  }
99 
100  for (Int32 i = 0; i < nb_row; i++) {
101  m_matrix_rows_nb_column[i] = 0;
102  if (((i + 1) < nb_row) && (m_matrix_row(i) == m_matrix_row(i + 1)))
103  continue;
104  for (Int32 j = m_matrix_row(i); ((i + 1) < nb_row && j < m_matrix_row(i + 1)) || ((i + 1) == nb_row && j < matrix_column_size); j++) {
105  if (DoFLocalId(m_matrix_column(j)).isNull())
106  continue;
107  //info() << "Add: (" << i << ", " << m_matrix_column(j) << " v=" << m_matrix_value(j);
108  linear_system.matrixAddValue(DoFLocalId(i), DoFLocalId(m_matrix_column(j)), m_matrix_value(j));
109  }
110  }
111 }
112 
113 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
114 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
115 
116 CsrFormatMatrixView CsrFormat::
117 view()
118 {
119  return CSRFormatView(m_matrix_row.to1DSmallSpan(), m_matrix_rows_nb_column.to1DSmallSpan(),
120  m_matrix_column.to1DSmallSpan(), m_matrix_value.to1DSmallSpan());
121 }
122 
123 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
124 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
125 
126 void CsrFormat::
127 printMatrix(std::string fileName)
128 {
129  ofstream file(fileName);
130  file << "size :" << m_nnz << "\n";
131  for (auto i = 0; i < m_matrix_row.dim1Size(); i++) {
132  file << m_matrix_row(i) << " ";
133  for (Int32 j = m_matrix_row(i) + 1; (i + 1 < m_matrix_row.dim1Size() && j < m_matrix_row(i + 1)) || (i + 1 == m_matrix_row.dim1Size() && j < m_matrix_column.dim1Size()); j++) {
134  file << " ";
135  }
136  }
137  file << "\n";
138  for (auto i = 0; i < m_nnz; i++) {
139  file << m_matrix_column(i) << " ";
140  }
141  file << "\n";
142  for (auto i = 0; i < m_nnz; i++) {
143  file << m_matrix_value(i) << " ";
144  }
145  file << "\n";
146  file.close();
147 }
148 
149 } // namespace Arcane::FemUtils
150 
151 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
152 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
153 
154 namespace Arcane
155 {
156 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
157 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
161 void FemUtils::
162 _translateCSRToCOO(Span<const Int32> csr_rows, SmallSpan<Int32> coo_rows,
163  const RunQueue& queue)
164 {
165  const Int32 nb_value = coo_rows.size();
166  const Int32 nb_row = csr_rows.size();
167 
168  {
169  auto command = makeCommand(queue);
170  command << RUNCOMMAND_LOOP1(iter, nb_row)
171  {
172  auto [i] = iter();
173  if (i != (nb_row - 1)) {
174  for (int j = csr_rows[i]; j < csr_rows[i + 1]; j++)
175  coo_rows[j] = i;
176  }
177  else {
178  // The last iteration fill the remaining values
179  for (int j = csr_rows[nb_row - 1]; j < nb_value; j++)
180  coo_rows[j] = nb_row - 1;
181  }
182  };
183  }
184 }
185 
186 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
187 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
188 
189 } // namespace Arcane
